reviews.comment:
Muy buenos servicios y ubicado estratégicamente sobre la ruta 23. Sugiero llenen tanque allí si siguen hacia Barilo o Villa..no van a encontrar otra...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and strategically located on Route 23. I suggest filling up there if you're heading towards Bariloche or Villa... you won't find another one...
